title: psychotria sessilis var. genuina
intro: Psychotria sessilis var. genuina, also known as the Wild Coffee or Dwarf Psychotria, is a small shrub or herbaceous plant native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Psychotria sessilis var. genuina are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
